original_abstract: *International Higher Education* (IHE) provides critical, expert-led analysis and commentary on the evolving trends and challenges facing global higher education. By examining the issues most relevant to systems, institutions, and stakeholders worldwide, the publication serves as a vital resource for navigating the complexities of the international academic landscape.
humanized_abstract: International Higher Education International Higher Education offers thoughtful analysis and commentary on developments of concern to higher education around the world. Issues addressed in IHE cover a wide range of topics of interest to higher education systems, institutions and organizations in all parts of the world.
